sizing_rule.note: Set stop loss at 1.5 ATR multiple; maintain 2:1 profit-to-max-loss ratio; account for transaction costs (0.2% buffer); reduce/halt sizing if 5+ consecutive stops hit. Van Tharp risk management framework.

source_rule_text: A trader should set protective stop losses carefully by accounting for transaction costs and maximum acceptable loss per trade, calibrated to personal objectives and temperament, to avoid cumulative losses that exceed profit targets.
